daily_briefing: We're in Phase 1: clearing out the clutter. 219 positions still need to go, holding ₹9.29L in trapped capital. Today's batch: 7 stocks to sell. Market was weak yesterday (-2.9%). Don't panic sell. If anything, pause sells and wait for a green day. Brent at $105 — oil-sensitive stocks under pressure. Favor IT and Pharma today.
tomorrow_preview: Tomorrow: 10 more positions to sell. At this pace, Phase 1 completes in ~21 trading days (5 weeks).
weekly_goal: This week's goal: sell 50 positions, free up ~₹23.2K. Keep selling into green days, pause on sharp red days.
sop_checklist: Open this page and read today's briefing
Review the SELL list — execute sells marked "TODAY" first
Check the WATCH list — note any big movers or reversals
Park sale proceeds in liquid fund (will deploy in Phase 2)
At market close: Sahil exports fresh holdings.csv from Zerodha
Push to GitHub — tomorrow's actions auto-generate overnight
